title: Is it possible to only share an specific view from a board to a Guest?
excerpt:
Hi all, 
I wanted to share an specific view (with only the relevant information) with a guest role, but they still can access all of this hidden columns through the “Main Table”. 
Any Ideas for a workaround?

posts.author: aarcia (Ana Sofia Arcia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I wanted to share an specific view (with only the relevant information) with a guest role, but they still can access all of this hidden columns through the “Main Table”.

Any Ideas for a workaround?

posts.author: AdamCPU (Adam Raphael)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can restrict the column’s viewablity. If all non-guests are in a team (if not, create a team just to grant viewing permissions and add everyone to it except the guest) then restrict column view, granting access to the team:

image792×372 40.2 KB
